title: himantoglossum hircinum subsp. affine
intro: Himantoglossum hircinum subsp. affine, also known as the Bees' Knees, is a rare orchid species native to the Mediterranean region. This orchid has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Himantoglossum hircinum subsp. affine include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and skin irritations. Himantoglossum hircinum subsp. affine can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
